title: Understanding the experience of the ‘older worker’ in a globalized world
abstract: Older Workers in a Globalizing World: An International Comparison of Retirement and Late-Career Patterns in Western Industrialized Countries. Hofäcker Dirk, Older Workers in a Globalizing World: An International Comparison of Retirement and Late-Career Patterns in Western Industrialized Countries. Cheltenham: Edward Elgar, 2010, £79.95 hbk, (ISBN: 9781848448179), 336 pp. Aging and Working in the New Economy: Changing Career Structures in Small IT Firms. McMullin Julie & Marshall Victor, (eds) Aging and Working in the New Economy: Changing Career Structures in Small IT Firms. Cheltenham: Edward Elgar, 2010, £65 hbk, (ISBN: 9781848441774), 256 pp. Ageing Labour Forces: Promises and Prospects. Taylor Philip, (ed.) Ageing Labour Forces: Promises and Prospects. Cheltenham: Edward Elgar, 2008, £59.95 hbk, (ISBN: 9781845424251), 240 pp.
